name: Mirage
description: Mirage’s sleight of hand complements her might. Her dazzled foes take heavy damage. Doppelgangers, lasers, and traps are elements of her stagecraft.
passiveDescription: Sliding lasts |DURATION|% longer and acrobatic maneuvers are |SPEED|% faster.

abilities.name: Hall Of Mirrors
abilities.description: Mirage creates an entourage of doppelgangers to confuse and distract the enemy.

abilities.name: Sleight Of Hand
abilities.description: Booby trap nearby objects while conjuring an irresistible jewel that bursts with radial blind when touched in darkness, or a radial explosion in light. Conjure multiple smaller jewels with the help of Hall of Mirrors.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.description:
(TAP) Temporarily reduce the damage Mirage takes from enemies.
(HOLD) Temporarily increase Mirage's weapon damage.

abilities.name: Prism
abilities.description: Fires an energy prism that shoots lasers in all directions. Activating again detonates the prism, blinding nearby foes.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Mirage’s sleight of hand complements her might. Her dazzled foes take heavy damage. Doppelgangers, lasers, and traps are elements of her stagecraft.

patchlogs.name: Update 32.2.0: Lua’s Prey
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the roll distance of Mirage’s Passive.
Before this change, Mirage's increased roll speed affected how fast the roll animation played, but moved her forward at the same rate, resulting in the roll traveling less distance. Now, the roll moves forward faster, to match the increased animation, so that she travels a distance comparable to a normal roll.

patchlogs.fixes:
The Mirage Oneiro Skin, originally designed by artist CleoNaturin, makes its debut with 2 custom Deluxe Animation sets for Noble and Agile stances!
The Mirage Oneiro Skin, originally designed by artist CleoNaturin, makes its debut with 2 custom Deluxe Animation sets for Noble and Agile stances!.
These follow suit with other Deluxe Animations (Khora Urushu, etc) where they are available for Mirage & Mirage Prime, but Mirage Oneiro must be purchased to equip the Animations on other Warframes.
Fixed Melee Guidance not being affected by Aura Strength Mods. This was causing Ash’s Blade Storm clones (also likely Mirage & Equinox clones) to give you temporary Melee Combo Duration buffs from their auras.
Fixed a script error when casting Mirage’s Sleight of Hand ability.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix: 29.2.4: NIGHTS OF NABERUS!
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s Eclipse ability not functioning properly with Deferred Rendering enabled. As detailed here! 
 A sharp-eyed Tenno noticed a change with Eclipse's damage bonus using our new Enhanced Graphics engine setting, and it turns out Mirage had us all under an illusion. Eclipse changes its effect intensity based on how bright (or dark) your current location is. The game calculates the brightness by considering all the light sources that are affecting you.  The problem... Under the Enhanced Graphics engine, lighting is handled in a different way than the Classic way we've been using for years. So while playing Landscape missions the sunlight was not being included in the intensity. What looked like bright open ground lit by the sun was, as far as the game is concerned internally, gloomy and overcast. This will be fixed such that the Eclipse ability will consider the real-time sunlight under the Enhanced renderer. We cannot guarantee that the results will be exactly the same using the two equations, but any difference should be negligible.

Mirage

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Mirage abilities now see the light more often than they used to. Previously, Mirage’s Eclipse would feel inconsistent when running through levels while going in and out of lit areas. This change will allow Eclipse to deal heavier damage as it will see light more often, but also increases Prism's damage and range by 15-20% average, as it too is affected by light!

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that could occur if a non-replicated avatar (ie. Mirage Clone) was affected by a friendly buff.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed weapon clips (Soma, Akstiletto, etc.) lingering during Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.6
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones meleeing with numerous Glaives after being thrown and returned.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.4 Operation Rathuum.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed other players getting damaged by projectiles (i.e Ogris)  after Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors expires.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.10.0: Operation Rathuum!
patchlogs.fixes: ·         Reduced the FX of the Thunderbolt mod on Mirage’s clones to improve performance.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed badge placements on Excalibur, Chroma, Mirage, Saryn and Atlas.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a typo that would appear in Mirage’s Quest subtitles.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes:
Mirage Prism Conclave Augment 
Prism follows above Mirage for 4 seconds.
Reduced the damage of Mirage’s Prism in Conclave.
You can no longer gain energy when Mirage’s Eclipse is active in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the damage but increased the duration of Mirage’s Prism in Conclave.
Reduced the damage of Mirage’s clones in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.3.1 + 18.3.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the duration of Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors in Conclave.
You can no longer gain energy while Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors is active in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the effectiveness of Mirage’s passive in Conclave.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s clones dealing damage from Bullet Jumps in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Elemental Mobility Mods no longer work with Mirage’s clones until she is at full Energy.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s clones staying slumped down and inactive after using a Focus Ability during Hall of Mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.0.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s Prism not properly blinding Clients in Conclave.
Fixed players getting damaged by illusions summoned by Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.changes: Vauban, Mirage, Nekros, and Limbo are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.6.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s clones having an incorrect fire spread when using the Phage as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/536814-mirage-hom-phage-resets-when-switching-between-clones/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.changes:
Only two clones from Mirage’s Hall of mirrors now fire projectiles.  This change has been made in order to help improve performance issues.  Damage has been increased on the remaining clones to compensate.
Players can now skip the crafting stages of the Hidden Messages Quest if they already have built a Mirage.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Simulor creating too many explosions when used with Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors and fire rate Mods.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.4.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed some lingering visual FX from Atomos/Amprex when used with Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/518981-atomos-beam-glitch-with-mirage-hom/

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Mirage’s clones produced from Hall of Mirrors will now display a smaller explosion when using the Concealed Explosives Mod to help improve performance.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Mirage's Hall of Mirrors clones not bullet-jumping.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Clones produced by Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors will no longer show cosmetic items for performance reasons.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s clones from Hall of Mirrors doing full damage to the Juggernaut.
Fixed occasional issues in the visual FX of Mirage’s Eclipse.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.10.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed charged beams from the Opticor not aiming properly when fired by Mirage’s clones.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a visual FX issue that would appear when Mirage used Hall of Mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones will no longer show cosmetic attachments for clients, or if your particle quality is set to low. This change is in an attempt to resolve reports of Performance/crash reports related to Mirage.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors causing a crash if you had no customizations on your Warframe or Melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.3 + Credit Reimbursement #2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Clones being able to hit Mirage with Tonkor shots.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue that would occur when using Mirage’s Eclipse that would prevent the player from using this Ability, or other powers, again.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes:
Mirage’s unique Trivelin Helmet and Limbo’s stylish Magrite Helmet will give your Warframe a new look.  Both helmets are available in the Market today!
Fixed visual issue with the Edo Prime Chest Piece when equipped to a Mirage using Eclipse.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.2
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s clones from Hall of Mirrors sometimes shooting in the wrong direction.
Fixed Mirage’s Winter Skin disappearing when Eclipse is activated.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.16 + Tactical Alert!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies aiming at Hall of Mirrors aiming behind themselves, instead of at Mirage’s image.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s HUD Eclipse Buff showing as going above 255% damage as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/385883-mirages-total-eclipse-bug-after-update-15100/

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.11.1
patchlogs.changes: Mirage is now able to gain energy from Team Energy Restore items while her Prism Ability is toggled on.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.11
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed visual effects on Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors clones when using the Panthera.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.10.1
patchlogs.changes:
Mirage’s Hall of Malevolence Augment has been buffed to give each of Mirage’s clones a damage increase of 5% per enemy killed, up to a total of 50% max clone damage.  Previously this damage increase was based on unmodded weapon damage.
Mirage’s Hall of Malevolence buff will now show as a % damage increase in the UI.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Prism occasionally not be destroyed at the end of the cast.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Kohm creating particle effects on Mirage’s clones when particle settings are not set to High in system settings.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s Eclipse Augment effects not working correctly when applied to other Warframes.
Fixed Silva and Aegis losing texture when used by Mirage during Hall of Mirrors as per:https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/365315-silva-aegis-skin-gets-messed-up-casting-hall-of-mirrors/
Fixed Mirage’s Prism never going away when cast outside of a Nullifier Crewman’s bubble, just before stepping into the bubble before the throw animation is complete.
Fixed issue occasionally caused by Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed crash that would occur when Mirage used Hall of Mirrors with a Torid equipped as a client.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.5.7+15.5.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Eclipse removing her festive holiday skin.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.1.0+15.1.01
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors clones not animating if you are using a different frames Animation Stance.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issues with Mirage’s Eclipse ability not correctly working with the Edo Chest armor.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.0.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Tweaked the arrow position for Mirage's Agile stance.
Limited the number of augment damage stacks that can be applied to Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones to 10.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed issues with the way the Foundry displays certain builds-in-progress, as seen with Mirage’s Harlequin helmet here: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/321773-harlequin-mirage-helmet-in-foundry
Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones not throwing Glaives if you're the Client.
Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones turning and throwing the Glaive in the wrong direction when you have it equipped as the host.
Fixed an issue where players may not receive the first Inbox message for the Mirage Quest.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Harlequin Mirage Helmet Blueprint incorrectly appearing as the Arcane Scorpion Ash Helmet Blueprint. Please note that we will be re-running a functioning Harlequin Helmet alert at a similar time as the broken one, but with a doubled duration.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.9.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage’s Prism lasers not targeting Orokin Drones.
Fixed Mirage’s Prism saying it used 100 power to activate when it only uses 50.
Fixed cases of Mirage’s Prism lasting forever/not using any energy, and being able to launch a second Prism.
Fixed Mirage’s Prism prematurely detonating if it hits a defense target.
Fixed Corpus security cameras sometimes being blind to a Mirage with Eclipse active.
Fixed issues with the Mirage Codex/Quest diorama having the wrong or conflicting Warframe presented.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.additions: Added in missing idle animations for Loki, Mirage, and Nova (noble). When inactive for a few seconds, each of these frames will now have idles!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.7.3 + 14.7.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with enemy AI freezing when trying to 'pull' a Mirage Hall of Mirror clone.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.7.0: Operation Gate Crash!
patchlogs.fixes:
Further improved the aiming of Mirage's Prism projectile.
Improved the performance of Mirage's Prism and Nova's Wormhole ability.
Fixed Mirage's Prism not being properly castable by AI.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Improved the aiming direction of Mirage's Prism ability.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.1+14.5.1.1
patchlogs.changes: • Changed Mirage Alt Helm to be untradable.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.5.0.1 + 14.5.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Mirage’s Eclipse lasting forever when cast.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.5: Operation Cryotic Front!
patchlogs.changes: • Changed FX of Laser Doors when affected by Mirage’s abilities to better indicate you’re safe to run through.
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors not being affected by some mods (Heavy Caliber).

patchlogs.name: Update 14.1.0: Quanta & Dendra
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue with progression on the Mirage ‘Hidden Messages’ quest if you already crafted the Chassis or already own a completed Mirage.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Mirage’s Prism visuals persisting in the game world if the ability was casted repeatedly (spammed).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Illiac Chest piece clipping into Ember, Nyx, and Mirage frames.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.5
patchlogs.changes:
Included a max number of instances for explosions available with Mirage’s Sleight of Hand ability.
Improved the performance of Mirage’s Prism ability on lower end computers.
Performance Improvements for Mirage + Hall of Mirrors and Angstrum, Ogris, Penta, and Mutalist Quanta, and Stug.
Improved performance on Mirage’s Prism when Particle Quality is set to low.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Mirage Hall of Mirror ‘illusions’ doing friendly damage in dojo duels, and possibly other places as well. https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/265762-hall-of-mirrors-friendly-fire-in-the-dojo/
Fixed cases of Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors Friendly Fire caused by temporary radiation induced faction change.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage quest mid-point not sending transmissions to continue finding the parts.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Altered the range of the visual effect of Mirage's Sleight of Hand ability.
Reduced the amount of projectile visual effects seen when using specific weapons in conjunction with Mirage's Hall of Mirror clones.
Fixed a number of power in use and loss of functionality issues related to Mirage's Sleight of Hand ability.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.fixes:
The newest Warframe, Mirage, is obtainable through the Quest System!
Mirage, a master of illusion, Mirage confounds the enemy in a spectacle of style and power.
If it’s Mirage you seek, you may obtain by Quest. To her powers of illusion we can attest. Within a vault, the requirements lie, as part of a dark and corrupted  infested sky.
The AkZani: the choice weapon of Mirage, these fast-firing dual pistols deliver a deadly performance.
